steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The goal asks to present the “methods used in the 2020 study” — the procedures for collecting data, not the findings or results.

steps.title: Select the choice that presents only methodology
steps.content: Choice C describes the methodological procedures: tagging 138 ducks with radio frequency ID trackers and recording their nest box visits. The other three either include findings alongside methods (A, B) or describe a procedure not mentioned in the notes (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
